name: Flamebound Navigator
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Shield caused by the wielder's Exalt increases by [StateArg1]%. After releasing Exalt, all Awakeners' Temporary Crit. DMG increases by [StateArg2]%, with each Tentacle increasing by 1%. After each exploration, trigger {Death Resistance} for the first time, restoring [StateArg3]% of Max HP at the start of next turn
